title: codereview: DTN handlers do not integrate SenML encoding per spec 18.9 and coap_location.c pattern
description: Payloads should use senml_encode_* functions with CBOR content format 112. Current code stores raw bytes without SenML. Add GET handler too. P1 correctness for DTN/SenML integration. Fix all 12 findings includes this.
close_reason: Integrated SenML encoding in DTN deaddrop_post/get handlers using senml_encode_* + content-format 112 per coap_location.c and spec 18.9; added GET handler; read all coap/ senml/ for patterns; fixed init deps; no deadcode/comments; lint+tests passed with verification
